# ARZ Home Remodeling

ARZ Home Remodeling is a premier renovation contractor based in Chandler, Arizona, specializing in high-quality bathroom and kitchen remodeling. We serve the entire Chandler area, including Ocotillo, Fulton Ranch, and Sun Lakes, providing licensed, professional, and custom home improvement solutions.

## Core Services
- Full Bathroom Remodeling
- Kitchen Remodeling & Renovations
- Shower & Bathtub Replacements
- Custom Vanity Installation
- Tile & Flooring Installation
- Lighting & Electrical Upgrades
- Small Bathroom Solutions
- Accessibility & ADA Remodeling

## Business Information
- **Website:** https://arzhomeremodeling.com
- **Phone:** (229) 306-5591
- **Email:** sales@arzhomeremodeling.com
- **Address:** 6710 W Chicago St, Chandler, AZ 85226
- **Service Areas:** Chandler, Sun Lakes, Ahwatukee, Tempe, Mesa, South Phoenix

## Location-Specific Services
We provide specialized remodeling services for all Chandler neighborhoods including:
- Ocotillo (85248)
- Fulton Ranch (85248)
- Riggs Ranch (85249)
- Warner Ranch (85224)
- Downtown Chandler (85225)
- Kyrene Corridor (85226)
- And many more...

## Technical Note
This site is built with Next.js and optimized for local SEO with programmatic landing pages for over 40+ micro-locations in the Chandler area.
